# AnyGif Bot

> AnyGif is a fully anonymous Telegram bot that converts any video URL into a GIF. It supports 1,700+ websites, costs 10 Telegram Stars per GIF, and collects zero user data.

## About

AnyGif lets users paste any video link, choose a start time and duration (up to 10 seconds), and receive a GIF instantly in Telegram. If generation fails, Stars are automatically refunded.

**Bot:** [@anygif_bot](https://t.me/anygif_bot)
**Price:** 10 Telegram Stars per GIF
**Max GIF length:** 10 seconds
**Contact:** [@alexandercranga on X](https://x.com/alexandercranga)

## Privacy & Anonymity

AnyGif is fully anonymous and collects zero data:

- No user IDs or chat IDs are stored
- No video URLs are collected or logged
- No generated GIFs or links are stored anywhere
- No cookies, no analytics, no tracking on the website
- No personal information of any kind
- No accounts or sign-ups required

Videos are processed in real-time and immediately discarded. Nothing persists.

## How It Works

1. **Send a link** — Paste any video URL from 1,700+ supported sites
2. **Pick your moment** — Choose the start time and duration (up to 10 seconds)
3. **Get your GIF** — Pay 10 Stars and receive your GIF instantly

## Supported Sites

AnyGif works with 1,700+ websites including:

**Video Platforms:** YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Bilibili, Rumble
**Social Media:** TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Reddit, Facebook
**Streaming & Gaming:** Twitch, Crunchyroll, VK Video
**News & Media:** BBC, CNN, Al Jazeera
**Music:** SoundCloud, Bandcamp, Audiomack
**Other:** Streamable, Imgur, Google Drive, Archive.org

Adult websites are also supported.

## FAQ

### What is AnyGif Bot?
AnyGif is a Telegram bot that converts any video URL into a GIF. Just paste a link, choose the moment you want, and get your GIF delivered right in the chat.

### How much does it cost?
Each GIF costs 10 Telegram Stars. Stars are Telegram's built-in digital currency that you can purchase directly within the app.

### What if the generation fails?
If your GIF fails to generate for any reason, your 10 Stars are automatically refunded. You'll never be charged for a GIF you didn't receive.

### What video sites are supported?
AnyGif supports over 1,700 websites including YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Reddit, Vimeo, Twitch, adult sites, and many more.

### What is the maximum GIF length?
GIFs can be up to 10 seconds long. You choose the start time and duration when creating your GIF.

### How do I use the bot?
Open @anygif_bot in Telegram and send any video URL. The bot will guide you through selecting the start time and duration, then generate your GIF after payment.

### Is my data stored?
No. AnyGif is fully anonymous and collects zero data. No user IDs, chat IDs, video URLs, or generated GIFs are stored. Videos are processed in real-time and immediately discarded.

### How do I get Telegram Stars?
You can purchase Telegram Stars directly within the Telegram app. Go to Settings > My Stars, or simply try to pay for a GIF and Telegram will prompt you to buy Stars.

## Privacy Policy

AnyGif Bot (@anygif_bot) is a fully anonymous Telegram bot service. Your privacy isn't just a feature — it's a core design principle.

### Data We Do NOT Collect

- No user IDs or chat IDs are stored
- No video URLs are collected or logged
- No generated GIFs or links are stored anywhere
- No cookies, no analytics, no tracking on this website
- No personal information of any kind

### How the Bot Works

When you send a video URL to AnyGif Bot, the video is processed in real-time to generate your GIF. Once the GIF is delivered to you in Telegram, all temporary processing data is immediately discarded. Nothing persists on our servers — no URLs, no files, no metadata.

### Payments

All payments are handled entirely by Telegram's Stars system. AnyGif does not process, access, or store any payment information.

### Third-Party Services

- **Telegram Bot API** — for receiving messages and sending GIFs
- **Cloud infrastructure** — for real-time video processing only, no data retention

### Your Rights

You can block or delete the bot at any time. Since no data is collected, there is nothing to request, export, or delete.

### Contact

Questions? Reach out on X: [@alexandercranga](https://x.com/alexandercranga)
